name: functiongraph-qrcode
description: FunctionGraph event function that returns a QR code PNG for a given URL
author: T Cloud Public

scripts.test:invoke: node -e "const handler = require('./index').handler; handler({ queryStringParameters: { url: 'https://localhost/' }, httpMethod: 'GET', path: '/'}).then((response) => { console.log(response.statusCode); console.log(response.headers['Content-Type']); console.log(response.body.length > 0 ? 'body-present: ' + response.body : 'body-missing'); }).catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); });"
